title: Section 14
content: No suit or other legal proceeding shall lie against the 1[Authorised Officer] or any other officer of the 2[Central Government] in respect of anything which is in good faith done or intended to be done under this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 13 of 2018, s. 116, for "Secretary" (w.e.f. 1-4-2018). 2 .Subs. by Act 13 of 2018, s. 131, for "Government" (w.e.f. 1-4-2018).
